scripts.encrypt: rm -rf site-encrypted && staticrypt site/index.html -t password_template.html --template-title 'Wedding Invitation' --template-instructions 'Please enter the password we shared with you to view our wedding details.' --template-placeholder 'Enter password...' --template-button 'View invitation' --template-error 'Incorrect password, please try again.' --remember 30 --template-remember 'Remember me for 30 days' -d site-encrypted --short && cp -r site/static site-encrypted/static
